SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-29-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, ANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION $3,080.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,165.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION
